Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Steelborn body]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — The Steelborn body is an Iron body that provides immense brute strength once the user reaches Underlord.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — The Steelborn Iron body is a type of body Enforcement technique.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — The Steelborn Iron body is a technique Yerin draws on.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Steelborn Iron body is a physical enhancement used by Yerin.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — The Steelborn Iron body is a physical attribute of Yerin that provides overwhelming strength at the Underlord stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Yerin flows madra through her Steelborn Iron body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin has a Steelborn Iron body.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin uses her Steelborn Iron body to kick off with great power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Ruby developed a copy of Yerin's Steelborn Iron body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Yerin sent madra into her Steelborn Iron body.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin can cycle her madra to her Steelborn Iron body.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 8''' — The Steelborn Iron body gives Yerin great capacity for strength compared to other Heralds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Yerin pushed her Steelborn Iron body to its limits.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
